_template_meta.purpose: Canonical schema for the Completion Notification Protocol routed-task. Filled in by close-inbox-item.py auto-write logic, or hand-populated when needed. See ~/.claude/rules/universal-protocols.md 'Completion Notification Protocol' section.

what_was_done: <copy of the closer's --what-was-done value, describing the actual work completed>
verification_summary: <one or two lines on how the work was verified -- key proof points, test runs, file paths, etc.>
what_originator_can_do_now: <concrete next action the originator can take, e.g. flip AUTOFIX_V2_MODE=on>
<another action, e.g. update project status to verified>
context: Completion notification for <original id> (originally filed by <originator>, completed by <completer>).
fix_instructions: Acknowledge this notification by closing it via close-inbox-item.py with --status processed. Optionally take the downstream actions listed in what_originator_can_do_now before closing.
